creator: howeyc@gmail.com
text:
I have sent this issue upstream, this will need to be handled in the
utility as it will affect all users upgrading Perl, not just FreeBSD users.
I'll update once I have a fix or additional information.


On 1 November 2012 01:01, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/parallel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/173230 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173230
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
